category.scope_note: Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, cellular, and IoT wireless device compliance comparison for export from China to Morocco under ANRT oversight.

title.en: China-to-Morocco Wireless / IoT Device Compliance Gap Matrix (ANRT)
title.zh: 中国无线/物联网设备进入摩洛哥：ANRT合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國無線/物聯網裝置進入摩洛哥：ANRT合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and IoT device documentation against Morocco ANRT mandatory homologation under Loi 24-96 relative à la poste et aux télécommunications, IMANOR/NM technical and EMC standards (ETSI-aligned), electrical safety requirements for 220 V / 50 Hz supply with Type C/E plug, Moroccan importer obligations, Arabic and French labelling requirements, and DGSSI cybersecurity advisory guidelines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国Wi-Fi、蓝牙及物联网设备文件与摩洛哥ANRT依据Loi 24-96（邮政与电信法）的强制型式核准、IMANOR/NM技术及电磁兼容标准（与ETSI对接）、220V/50Hz供电及C/E型插头电气安全要求、摩洛哥进口商义务、阿拉伯语及法语标注要求，以及DGSSI网络安全指引的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國Wi-Fi、藍牙及物聯網裝置文件與摩洛哥ANRT依據Loi 24-96（郵政與電信法）的強制型式核准、IMANOR/NM技術及電磁相容標準（與ETSI對接）、220V/50Hz供電及C/E型插頭電氣安全要求、摩洛哥進口商義務、阿拉伯語及法語標注要求，以及DGSSI網路安全指引的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, ANRT homologation, legal opinion, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and device manufacturers should verify current Moroccan telecommunications law, ANRT homologation procedures, IMANOR/NM standards, Arabic and French labelling obligations, and applicable customs duties with qualified regulatory professionals before importation or sale in Morocco.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、ANRT型式核准、法律意见、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和设备制造商在进口或于摩洛哥销售前，应与合格监管专业人士核验现行摩洛哥电信法、ANRT型式核准程序、IMANOR/NM标准、阿拉伯语及法语标注义务及适用关税。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、ANRT型式核准、法律意見、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和設備製造商在進口或於摩洛哥銷售前，應與合格監管專業人士核驗現行摩洛哥電信法、ANRT型式核准程序、IMANOR/NM標準、阿拉伯語及法語標注義務及適用關稅。

answer_first.en: ANRT mandatory homologation under Loi 24-96 relative à la poste et aux télécommunications is the primary gap for any wireless or telecom terminal device exported from China to Morocco. CE mark, CCC, and SRRC approval are not recognised by ANRT; a separate Moroccan homologation process with ETSI-referenced test reports is required. Additional gaps include IMANOR/NM-aligned EMC standards, 220 V / 50 Hz electrical safety with Type C/E plug, a Moroccan local importer company, bilingual Arabic and French product labelling, and DGSSI cybersecurity advisory guidelines.
answer_first.zh: 依据摩洛哥邮政与电信法（Loi 24-96），ANRT强制型式核准是中国出口至摩洛哥的任何无线或电信终端设备的首要差距。CE标志、CCC及SRRC批准均不被ANRT承认；须另行完成以ETSI参考标准测试报告为基础的摩洛哥型式核准程序。其他差距还包括：IMANOR/NM对接的电磁兼容标准、220V/50Hz电气安全（C/E型插头）、须有摩洛哥当地进口商公司、阿拉伯语及法语双语产品标注，以及DGSSI网络安全指引。
answer_first.zht: 依據摩洛哥郵政與電信法（Loi 24-96），ANRT強制型式核准是中國出口至摩洛哥的任何無線或電信終端裝置的首要差距。CE標誌、CCC及SRRC批准均不被ANRT承認；須另行完成以ETSI參考標準測試報告為基礎的摩洛哥型式核准程序。其他差距還包括：IMANOR/NM對接的電磁相容標準、220V/50Hz電氣安全（C/E型插頭）、須有摩洛哥當地進口商公司、阿拉伯語及法語雙語產品標注，以及DGSSI網路安全指引。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
